name: Spaghetti with Salmon & Sorrel (or Spinach)
recipeInstructions:
Note: Amount given for sorrel (or spinach) is for trimmed weight.
1. Roll a few sorrel or spinach leaves tightly, then snip across with scissors to make fine green ribbons. Chop broccoli florets into very small pieces. Bring salted water to boil for pasta.
2. Melt 2 oz butter in a flameproof casserole suitable for serving at table. Add broccoli and stir to coat with fat. Cover and cook gently for 1 minute. Add pepper, salt, and 2 teaspoons lemon juice (or more if using spinach). Distribute flavorings by shaking the casserole.
3. Scatter flaked fish over broccoli without stirring. Cover and let sit on very gentle heat for 3 minutes.
4. Cook pasta in separate pot until well drained.
5. Remove casserole from heat, add drained spaghetti, Parmesan, and most of the green ribbons. Toss quickly to coat pasta with butter and ensure it is flecked with salmon and broccoli colors. Season as needed and sprinkle remaining greens on top. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
